name: javis-brainstorming
description: Turn a brainstorm-worthy voice/keyboard unit into a generic to-do card whose ready-to-paste prompt hands off to Claude's content-brainstorming skill (with javis_mcp pulling the source transcript). Runs on demand and is auto-run by the javis-server session dispatcher (no approve-to-run card); the card is written PENDING, a markdown digest of it is pushed to your iOS Agent Chat, and the human gate is Confirm/Discard in the iOS Calendar tab. Triggers: 'brainstorm this', '整理成簡報', '帮我腦力激盪'.
